package.description: Export PCB 3D Models from KiCad to Blender
package.description_full:
The pcb2blender workflow lets you create professionally looking product renders of all your KiCad projects in minutes! Simply export your board as a .pcb3d file in KiCad, import it into Blender and start creating!
(Note for Linux/macOS users: If you run into any issues, make sure you're running python 3.10).
If you want to support this project, you can do so at https://github.com/sponsors/30350n
package.name: pcb2blender

package.description: Kicad symbol and footprint libraries, with a focus on components used in analog and DSP audio.
package.description_full:
Kicad symbol and footprint libraries for analog and digital (DSP) audio electronics.

You must add these libraries to your library tables, see GitHub link for instructions.

These libraries are used at 4ms Company in our audio devices. Most symbols include manufacturer name and part number, and sometimes multiple alternative numbers. Some parts have JLCPCB part numbers as well, which is used by our BOM and XYPOS scripts in order to streamline using their services (see our GitHub page for links to those scripts).

Each symbol represents a unique part. For example, there is a separate symbol for each combination of resistor value, tolerance, and size. While this makes for a lot of symbols, Kicad's filter toolbar in the symbol chooser makes finding a part easy, and there is less chance for BOM errors.

When possible, symbols look like the official KiCad symbols, so that it's easy to use official and 4ms symbols in the same schematic.
package.name: 4ms Kicad Libraries

package.description: copies 3D models to the project local subfolder
package.description_full:
Copies footprint models to the project local subfolder and remaps all the links within the used footprints.
 !!! Warning! If you update the footprint the link between the footprint and 3D model will be reset. You'll need to re-run the plugin in order to remap the links. You can make the layout file completely independent if you also export the footprints to project local librarary via menu File/Export/Footprints to new library and update the footprint to refer to new library.
package.name: Archive 3D Models

package.description: Arrange footprints on a line, circle or grid.
package.description_full:
Arrange sequentially numbered footprints or footprints from multiple hierarchical sheets in linear, circular or matrix arrangement. This plugin works on footprints already present in the layout, so that layout and schematics stay in sync.
The placement of footprints from multiple hierarchical sheets works well together with ReplicateLayout plugin
package.name: Place Footprints

package.description: Swap stubs
package.description_full: Swaps the ratsnest between two pins and also swaps the lables in the schematics to keep the schematis in sync
package.name: SwapStubs

package.description: User-friendly library package for beginners
package.description_full: Simple Libraries library pack is a collection of common electronic components libraries for the free and open-source KiCAD PCB design software. The goal of Simple Libraries is to provide a user-friendly library package  for beginners. Components like resistors and capacitors are name base on the values like 10k,100ohm, 22uF… So users can directly search for the value and directly add it to their design.
package.name: Simple Libraries

package.description: Import library files from Octopart, Samacsys, Ultralibrarian, Snapeda and EasyEDA
package.description_full:
Import library files from Octopart, Samacsys, Ultralibrarian, Snapeda and EasyEDA.
 For usage and correct setup please read the Readme: 
 https://github.com/Steffen-W/Import-LIB-KiCad-Plugin#use-of-the-application
package.name: impart GUI for KiCad

package.description: KiCad plugin for git
package.description_full: Git actions directly from KiCad's PCB editor window
package.name: Git plugin

package.description: Push your layout to AISLER with just one click for instant Powerful Prototyping
package.description_full:
Want to use Powerful Prototyping or Amazing Assembly from AISLER? This plugin will provide you with a convenient one-click push to our service.
When you click the AISLER Push-Button we will export your project's
• Gerber Files in the right format, so that production will run ultra-smooth
• IPC-Netlist-File to enable Smart Tests for production so that you get feedback down to the tiniest trace on how to improve your design for production
• BOM-file to import all components you have already assigned in your project
• P'n'P-file to get your project ready for assembly
Once the upload (which will only take a couple of seconds) is complete you can place your order within less than one minute. If you iterate on your design and click the push button again, we will make sure your project is only stored as a new revision on our server.
About AISLER:
AISLER makes hardware less hard by providing simple electronics manufacturing for everyone. We are based in Europe and focus on amazingly affordable prices, super swift delivery and outstanding customer support. We are KiCad Platinum Sponsor as we donate a significant amount of our revenues made from KiCad designs back to the project.
package.name: AISLER Push for KiCad

package.description: KiCad Symbol and Footprint Library for Arduino Modules
package.description_full:
You may need to manually update the library tables in the Library Manager to get the new symbols and footprints to show up: please refer to the GitHub link below for full documentation and installation instructions.

This is a library of KiCad schematic symbols and PCB footprints for most Arduino modules. You can use them to make your own PCB design which will effortlessly connect with your chosen Arduino module.
package.name: KiCad Library for Arduino Modules

package.description: Create gerber files for some PCB order services.
package.description_full: Create zip files which includes gerber files for each PCB services.
package.name: gerber to order

package.description:
JLC PCB fabrication toolkit
Automate PCB fabrication process in conjunction with JLC PCB
package.description_full:
Toolkit for automating PCB fabrication process with KiCad and JLC PCB. 

 Features: 
• Generates gerber files in correct format for production. 
• Generates BOM file in correct format for production. 
• Generates Pick and Place file in correct format for assembly. 
• Automatic and manual component translations. 
• Many more unique additional features. 
♥ https://github.com/sponsors/bennymeg
package.name: Fabrication Toolkit

package.description: A JLCPCB integration addon for KiCAD
package.description_full: This plugin allows you to search the JLCPCB parts database, assign LCSC article numbers to your parts, generate production files for JLCPCB and much more.
package.name: KiCAD JLCPCB tools

package.description: A suite of kicad pcbnew action plugin tools
package.description_full: Annular Ring Checker, Snap Selected Footprint(s) to Grid, Fabrication Footprint Position, Move Selected Drawings to chosen Layer, Checking 3D missing models
package.name: pcb-action-tools

package.description: A KiCAD plugin to connect two random traces
package.description_full: This plugin connects two traces with one another by extending or shortening both until they intersect.
package.name: connect-traces

package.description: A collection of symbols/footprints for keyboard design
package.description_full: This library focuses on keyboard design, and features - among others - footprints for Cherry MX, Alps SKCM, Hi-Tek 725, Kailh Choc v1 and v2.
package.name: marbastlib

package.description: Place keys according to a KLE specificaiton
package.description_full: Places footprints according to a keyboard-layout-editor.com specification. Only moves keys that are not at a valid position, so swapping keys is simple!
package.name: KLEPlacement

package.description: Custom font label generator
package.description_full: A label generator that renders svgs from truetype fonts, and creates silkscreen footprints for your PCB. Based of a similar plugin for Cadsoft Eagle called Buzzard
package.name: KiBuzzard

package.description: KiCad to SVG and then back again
package.description_full:
Seamless artistic workflow for KiCad and Inkscape.

Users can start by drawing a schematic and laying out a PCB, then bring it into Inkscape to arrange a thousand LEDs into a flower arrangement, then bring it back into KiCad to lay out traces, back into Inkscape to curve the traces, back into KiCad to change their microcontroller and few pin assignments, back into Inkscape to draw out some silkscreem patterns, back into KiCad to run DRC, and so on. The workflow is intended to be seamless and painless to go back and forth.

Click the homepage link - https://github.com/JarrettR/Stretch - to see how it works.
package.name: Stretch

package.description: A plugin to toggle visibility of all reference designators
package.description_full: This plugin allows to hide all reference designators in a Layout file at the click of a single button, if all references are hidden, all will be shown
package.name: Hide References

package.description: A subdivision- and/or native arc-based track rounding plugin.
package.description_full: Algorithmically smooth tracks in a predictable manner. Useful for flex PCBs, or just because it looks cool.
package.name: Round Tracks

package.description: Keyboard switch footprint library
package.description_full:
This package contains footprints for popular keyboard switches, these are generated automatically.
Supported footprints:

- Cherry MX or equivalent, Plate and PCB mount.
- Alps/Matias or equivalent.
- Hybrid footprints for Cherry MX and Alps/Matias (accepts both).
- Kailh Choc low profile switches (version 1).
- Kailh Hotswap sockets for Cherry MX equivalent switches.
package.name: Keyswitch Kicad Library

package.description: Symbols collection similar to the one used by the italian magazine: Nuova Elettronica
package.description_full: Nuova Elettronica was a  glorious italian magazine that have promoted electronics not only in italy but in all EU Countries. Indeed it was translated in several languages and distributed along the whole EU Territories.
package.name: Nuova Elettronica Symbols Library

package.description: Hide all silkscreen reference designators for selected footprints
package.description_full: Hide all silkscreen reference designators for selected footprints
package.name: Bulk hide silkscreen designators

package.description: Automation for KiCAD
package.description_full:
KiKit is a Python library, KiCAD plugin and a CLI tool to automate several tasks in a standard KiCAD workflow like:
• panelization of both, regular and oddly shaped, boards
• automated exporting manufacturing data based on manufacturer presets
• multi-board project in KiCAD
• building board presentation pages
• making 3D-printed solder stencils
• and more
package.name: KiKit

package.description: A footprint and schematic library for KiKit annotations.
package.description_full: KiKit uses these symbols a footprints to annotate your boards (e.g., to place a tab in a panel).
package.name: KiKit Library

package.description: Generic Elektuur style symbols, primarily intended for circuit diagrams used for documentation and SPICE simulation.
package.description_full:
Elektuur style symbols as introduced in the later 1970s (until the early 1990s when they became more angular).
The symbol sizes have been increased by 1.6 % (2 mm grid to 80 mil grid) and the pins realigned to a 2.54 mm (100 mil) grid.
Recommended Schematic Setup: default line width and wire thickness 0.254 mm (10 mil), junction dot size Small (40 mil), text size 1.27 mm (50 mil), grid 2.54 mm (100 mil), automatically place symbol fields unchecked.
Library Paths:
${KICAD6_3RD_PARTY}/symbols/com_gitlab_franzee_kicad-addons_elektuur/Elektuur.kicad_sym
${KICAD6_3RD_PARTY}/footprints/com_gitlab_franzee_kicad-addons_elektuur/Elektuur.pretty
package.name: Elektuur Style Symbol Library

package.description: Generic international symbols, intended as building blocks and for SPICE simulation.
package.description_full:
Generic symbols mostly compatible with IEC/IEEE/ANSI/GOST/DIN/EN/GB standards, intended for SPICE simulation and as building blocks for fully specified symbols. Includes ANSI/IEEE Std 315 zigzag/curved/looped resistor/capacitor/inductor symbols and distinctive shape logic symbols that match the corresponding IEC (uniform shape) symbols.
Recommended Schematic Setup: default line width and wire thickness 0.254 mm (10 mil), text size and grid 2.54 mm (100 mil), automatically place symbol fields unchecked.
Library Path:
${KICAD6_3RD_PARTY}/symbols/com_gitlab_franzee_kicad-addons_generic/Generic.kicad_sym
${KICAD6_3RD_PARTY}/symbols/com_gitlab_franzee_kicad-addons_generic/Generic-50.kicad_sym
package.name: Generic Symbol Library

package.description: Generate interactive html BOM to assist with manual pcb assembly
package.description_full:
This plugin generates a convenient Bill of Materials (BOM) listing with the ability to visually correlate and easily search for components and their placements on the PCB. It is particularly useful when hand-soldering a prototype, as it allows users to quickly find locations of components groups on the board. It is also possible to reverse lookup the component group by clicking on a footprint on the board drawing.
The plugin utilizes Pcbnew python API to read PCB data and render silkscreen, fab layer, footprint pads, text, and drawings. BOM table fields and grouping is fully configurable, additional columns, such as a manufacturer ID, can be added in Schematic editor and imported either through the netlist file, XML file generated by Eeschema's internal BOM tool, or from board file itself.
There is an option to include tracks/zones data as well as netlist information allowing dynamic highlight of nets on the board.
package.name: Interactive Html Bom

package.description: Batch resize, scale, mirror graphics, tracks, zones, footprints and other items in the PCB editor.
package.description_full:
Batch resize, scale, mirror graphics, tracks, zones, footprints and other items in the PCB editor.
Inspired by free transform tool in graphics editors.
Important notes:
• Mirror does not change layers, it transforms in place
• When a singular footprint is selected it's items are scaled so the footprint itself will become larger/smaller
• When more than one item is selected footprints are not changed or rescaled, only repositioned/rotated
• Pads are not rescaled, only repositioned/rotated
• Rotation center is geometrical center of combined bounding box of all selected items
package.name: Transform It

package.description: Get an instant quote and order without leaving KiCad.
package.description_full:
Our plugin saves you time since you no longer need to output the data to send it to the PCB house. This also spares you from the errors that come with this step. Because, trust us, as a manufacturer, we see designers sending the wrong data every day, causing delays and money.
 So here's how it works: once you have completed the layout, all you need to do is go to Tools and External Plugins, and select Sierra Circuits Quote.
 A window will pop-up and show the specifications. Our plugin reads the design for a smooth quote process. Most of the board information will be automatically filled out, such as the dimensions and layer number. It is then up to you to choose the thickness, surface finish, etc. 
 Review the parameters, pick the quantity and turn time, get assembly if needed, and place your order.This is as simple as it sounds!
package.name: Sierra Quote Plugin
